NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE), CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2012, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER WITHOUT A HEARING PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PETITIONER'S ORDER IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT SHALL STAY AT LEAST 100 YARDS AWAY FROM THE PROTECTED PERSON: JULIA LUNDWALL; THE HOME OF THE PROTECTED PERSON EXCEPT FOR ONE RETURN TO THE HOME FOR UP TO ONE HOUR WITH A POLICE STAND-BY ON MARCH 2, 2012 TO IDENTIFY HIS PERSONAL BELONGINGS TO THE MOVERS. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT PHYSICALLY ABUSE, FINANCIALLY ABUSE, INTIMIDATE, MOLEST, ATTACK, ASSAULT (SEXUALLY OR OTHERWISE), HIT, FOLLOW, STALK, THREATEN, HARASS, DESTROY PERSONAL PROPERTY, KEEP UNDER SURVEILLANCE, OR BLOCK MOVEMENTS, CONTACT (DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY), TELEPHONE, SEND MESSAGES, MAIL OR E-MAIL, TAKE ANY ACTION, DIRECTLY OR THROUGH OTHERS, TO OBTAIN THE ADDRESSES OR LOCATIONS OF THE PROTECTED PERSONS. NO GUNS OR OTHER FIREARMS/TURN IN OR SELL GUNS OR FIREARMS. EXPIRES FEBRUARY 22, 2017.
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE) (CLETS) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED LUNDWALL, JULIA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED AQUINO, DOMINGO ANTHONY
